gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/297)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (10/297)
text: مَا مِنْ مَظْلِمَةٍ أَشَدَّ مِنْ مَظْلِمَةٍ لَا يَجِدُ صَاحِبُهَا عَلَيْهَا عَوْناً إِلَّا اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Al Husayn Bin Saeed, from Ibrahim Bin Abdul Hameed, from Al Waled Bin Sabeeh,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘There is none from an injustice more difficult than an injustice (which) its owner cannot find assistance upon except for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from al-Husayn ibn Sa’id from Ibrahim ibn ‘Abd al-Hamid from al-Walid ibn Sabiyh from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “No injustice is more severe than the one against which the oppressed cannot find any support except Allah, the Most Majestic, the Most Holy.”
